impacts.statement: Water is across the surface of State Highway 19 bridge.
Water reaches the underclearence of the State Highway 19 bridge.
Thousands of acres of agricultural land are under water.
Several thousand acres of agricultural and lowland become inundated.
Lowlands and agricultural land near the river begin to flood.

dataAttribution.title: Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.
